item.title: Topless Pulp Fiction // 60 Second Docs
item.description: When the weather is fine and the grass is green, the ladies and gentlemen of New York’s Outdoor Co-Ed Topless Pulp Fiction Appreciation Society can be found reading their favorite lit classics with nothing but the breeze touching their chests. As a reminder to all locals, New York law now allows public toplessness for both men and women - and this unique book club sets a tone for what the city’s future could look like.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs

item.title: Weight loss progress in under a year. About 70 lbs difference
item.dc:creator: clittortoise

item.title: No one understood my 40th birthday picture
item.description: I know, no selfies. But I was honestly really disappointed that no one understood the picture I took for my 40th birthday. I figured you guys would get it at least. Edit: Wow! Most viral! Thank you to all the fellow kids who got the reference and for the birthday wishes! I was feeling a little down about turning 40 and you guys made me feel much better. ❤️
item.dc:creator: isisathene22

item.title: A selection of my tattoos
item.description:
Look, you know why i made this the top picture, I want those sweet imaginary points -Chandelure with Scyther skull
My newest, a Yaksha I got in Thailand
My oldest, a Christian tramp stamp, one day it will be covered up
My and my beastie got matching pieces from an artpiece or proverbs, this means "they shit from the same hole" aka inseparable
An aged wrist tattoo in memoriam of Neil Peart
Gomamon one of my favourite pieces
Pokeball, paid 20$ and a pound of coffee for it, needs touch up
My tiefling bard
And my Barbarian woman

item.title: Bottom shelf life lesson...and memes. Lot of them.
item.description:
So I did.
In a sense, I guess my gas only cost me $3.
IS THIS WHAT'S WRONG WITH ME?!
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
@CrimeBrulee >:(
For the sake of #tattoo day on Imgur twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Mr. Nutterbutt tax

item.title: This is Luce the real fighter and a story of her life.
item.description: "Over 7000 km traveled, a long 8 hour flight from Rome to Montreal, over 10 different vet appointments, 8 days spent at the vet getting treatment, multiple tests & biopsies, an ear surgery to remove Squamous Cell cancer, mouth surgery to remove 5 teeth, & thousands of prayers from our community - Luce is healing and getting better." Source: https://www.instagram.com/thesimbafoundation
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Images of Note: I'm going cozy mode
item.description:
mood
Do it now.
0w0
t w i n k p a d
There is a story here.
This is what working retail is like
I hope when he leaves office he goes off script and tells people that we should go on a general strike for healthcare or something?
hell yeah
:3
nya!
if everyone looks like this in the meeting, something is up
See this, this is what I look like when I'm having an episode, eyes and all.
PEPITO THEY SHOT TRUMP!
8 >
dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance
I may or may not watch Serial Experiments Lain.
kinda want a bear onsie.
Having fun :3
We millennials are so fucked up
So fun fact, in the papers there's constant calls to come back to the office, despite businesses, workers and managers all saying it's cheaper, easier, and better for their staff and company. Like front page thinkpieces on slow news days complaining about working from home. You know why? Because politicians and people who own the newspapers have invested in office space and retail near office space and they want people to come back to the office because companies are scaling back office space to have a hybrid model of working. That's why there's a push to not merely go back to the office, but to abolish working from home.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: The cheese tax must be paid regardless of your age
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Dark is Cool
item.description: Photosynthetic organisms such as plants, plankton and algae use sunlight to produce oxygen that cycles into the ocean depths, but previous studies conducted in the deep sea have shown that oxygen is only consumed, not produced, by the organisms that live there, Sweetman said. Now, his team’s research is challenging this long-held assumption, finding oxygen produced without photosynthesis. “You’re cautious when you see something that goes against what should be happening,” he said. The study, published Monday in the journal Nature Geoscience, demonstrates how much is still unknown about the ocean depths and underscores what’s at stake in the push to exploit the ocean floor for rare metals and minerals. Its finding that there’s another source of oxygen on the planet other than photosynthesis also has far-reaching implications that could help unravel the origins of life. https://amp.cnn.com/cnn/2024/07/22/science/dark-oxygen-discovery-deep-sea-mining
item.dc:creator: l3ikes

item.title: Shelves Build
item.description:
Cold chiseling the hardware
Drilling on my 100 year old post drill
Original design sketch
Lightly chiseled outline
I hand cut the first one, switched to the treadle hammer for the rest
All cut and rough shaped
How the bracket will fit. It will cover any inconsistencies in the corner miters of the shelves, as well as adding some interest.
Drifted the holes in the narrower sections.
All finish shaped, drilled, and drifted.
Seasoning in the oven, flax oil at 400F
Made some beveled square washers while I was at it, a lot of grinding.
They look pretty good though
All the hardware finish seasoned
Installed on the shelves
item.dc:creator: MachinatioVitae

item.title: Much Needed Gaming Table
item.description:
Gluing and clamping legs out of 4x4s
Attaching legs to cross-members (just some 2x4s)
2' tall seemed short, but it's just about perfect.
Boxed out with 1x6 boards. This made the space for the TV, and what would become the storage nooks. TV is not fixed in place yet, just helping scale everything else.
Hit the lower potion with two coats of Minwax PolyShades for some protection and color.
Connecting the table top to the legs with four bolts. Will anyone see them? nope. Did I paint the heads black so they'd look nice anyways? Yep.
Finished lower portion of the tabletop.
Cut this hole shockingly well. I just plunge-cut with a circular saw then freed the corners with a jigsaw. Used a guide to keep it straight. The piece cut out was good enough to just use as a plug rather than cutting and making a new one to fit.
Bought a router for the occasion. Just to round things over and give it a more finished look. I know it's just plywood, but at the cost of that stuff these days I decided it was worth it.
Used a slightly darker tint of polyshades on the top surface and finished off with a couple coats of polyurethane.
The aforementioned plug to protect the tv when not in use. Got the same treatment as the rest of the tabletop.
3-1/8 inch holes for plugs for the players. We use digital character sheets, so we have all manner of phones, tablets and laptops around.
Got these on a good deal on Amazon. They just plug right into a power strip. Yes. Piggybacking. But, it's just to charge a few devices. No power tools. Got a power strip that'll cut off if somehow it's overdrawn.
Looking so nice and low profile.
Vinyl sheet to protect the screen from minis, game pieces, terrain and dice. No metal or stone dice to be sure.
Dramatic Reenactment: D&D Setup from DM's point of view
Player point of view.
I found pulling board games into my VTT* makes for some fun times. He's a setup for a round of Robo Rally. *I swear by Owlbear Rodeo.
Found an online catan map generator.
The open nooks all around make it great for just throwing on music. Even if it's closed up.
Pop in the plug and plenty of room for games.
I need to recreate my oversized risk board.
item.dc:creator: Brazedowl

item.title: The weed myth is back to discourage people from voting
item.dc:creator: Ratufa

item.title: Working on walking today with weighted vest and ankle weights.
item.description: My balance was a bit shakey at the beginning today but I thought it got better throughout my walk. I was able to walk 35 ft in 66 seconds. I will keep working hard ?
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: The Man That Rescues Dogs ISBN on Tattuesday
item.description:
Meet Michael! He's The Man That Rescues Dogs and I'm publishing his upcoming memoir. I jokingly told him to get our ISBN number tattooed and today he did!
He is pretty easy to love. Always the comedian.
A few of his rescues! TMTRD is the home of The Wheelchair Mafia.
This is Coke! The first wheelchair dog that started it all! He is passed now but his memory lives on in the 44 other wheelchair pups that are alive now because of him. EDIT: Wow! Front page?! Thank you, Imgur! I love this community of good people supporting other good people. For those wondering, the organization is The Man That Rescues Dogs, or @tmtrdorg on socials.
item.dc:creator: psychologywithsamantha

item.title: Sea serpent sculpture
item.description: 130-meter aluminum sea serpent skeleton sculpture in Saint Brevin near Nantes, France. https://www.atlasobscura.com/places/serpent-d-ocean
item.dc:creator: WullieBlake
